subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Bayan, made manifest the Proof, and called all who dwell in the realm of possibility unto a station wherein they speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل البیان و اظهر البرهان و دعا من فی الامکان الی مقام ینطق فیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
